title: Amazon CEO sees AI doubling prior AWS sales projections to $600 billion by 2036
description: AmazonO> CEO Andy Jassy said during an ‌internal all-hands meeting he expects artificial ‌intelligence could help cloud computing unit Amazon Web Services achieve $600 ​billion in annual sales, double his own prior estimate. “I've been thinking for the last number of years that AWS, call it 10 years from ‌now, could be ⁠about a $300 billion annual revenue, run rate business,” Jassy said, according to ⁠a review of his comments by Reuters. “I think what's happening in AI that AWS has ​a chance ​to be at least ​double that.”
